ddls:
CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "department_code" TEXT /* Code for the department (e.g., ASTR for Astronomy) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department that offers the course */,
  "course_title" TEXT /* Title of the course */,
  "subject" TEXT /* Subject code for the course */,
  "credit_hours" INTEGER /* Number of credit hours awarded for completing the course */,
  "offered_term" TEXT /* Term in which the course is offered */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instructors" (
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instructor */,
  "instructor_name" TEXT /* Name of the instructor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the instructor */,
  "office_hours" TEXT /* Office hours of the instructor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sections" (
  "section_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each section */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course the section belongs to */,
  "section" TEXT /* Section identifier (e.g., B01, K01) */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum number of students that can register for this section */,
  "waitlist_capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum number of students that can be placed on the waitlist */,
  "waitlist_actual" INTEGER /* Actual number of students on the waitlist */,
  "actual_registered" INTEGER /* Actual number of students registered for the section */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instructor teaching the section */,
  "meeting_time" TEXT /* Meeting time of the section (e.g., Monday, Wednesday, Friday: 10am-11:15am) */,
  "meeting_location" TEXT /* Meeting location of the section (e.g., Building A, Room 101) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("section_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sections_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sections_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES instructors ("instructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "registrations" (
  "registration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each registration */,
  "section_id" INTEGER /* ID of the section the student is registered for */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the student registered for the section */,
  "drop_date" TEXT /* Date the student dropped the section (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("registration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_registrations_section_id FOREIGN KEY ("section_id") REFERENCES sections ("section_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "waitlists" (
  "waitlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each waitlist entry */,
  "section_id" INTEGER /* ID of the section the student is waitlisted for */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "waitlist_date" TEXT /* Date the student was added to the waitlist */,
  "removed_date" TEXT /* Date the student was removed from the waitlist (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("waitlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_waitlists_section_id FOREIGN KEY ("section_id") REFERENCES sections ("section_id")
)
